summary: Stellar recording with a perfectly balanced mix and a standout Bobby Weir performance on "Sailor‑Saint".
review: Both reviewers gush over the superb audio quality, noting an evenly balanced mix where every instrument and vocal shines. The show itself is highlighted as an all‑time favorite thanks to Bob Weir’s inspired delivery on “Sailor‑Saint,” making this release a must‑have for Deadheads.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews give five stars, praising an excellent recording and a top‑notch performance; the combined weighting yields a near‑perfect rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: All instruments and vocals present and evenly balanced; mix described as stellar and very clean.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set flow; reviewers focus on overall excellence of the performance.

band_member_comments.Bob: Bobby (Bob Weir) is praised as being at his best on Sailor‑Saint.
